language-string-table.var: An unknown error has occurred. Please try again later.
Authentication failed or session expired. Please close your browser and log in again.
Your access to the casino is temporarily restricted.
Your access to the casino is temporarily restricted.
Your access to the casino is temporarily restricted.
Your access to the casino is temporarily restricted.
Your access to the casino is temporarily restricted.
Your account is not enabled for real money play. Please contact customer service.
Your account is not enabled for real money play. Please contact customer service.
Your access to the casino is temporarily restricted.
Your account has been disabled. Please contact customer service.
Your account is not enabled for real money play. Please contact customer service.
Your access to the casino is temporarily restricted.
Credit players are restricted from playing the casino.
Language data load failed. Please contact support.
Insufficient funds to place bet, please make a deposit.
Insufficient funds to add new bet
No more bet postings allowed at this time
Bet is not allowed at this time
Bet cannot be removed at this time
No bet was placed to start game
This wagering will exceed your wagering limitation. Please try a smaller amount or change your wagering limit.
Database connection could not be established
Database yielded no data during last query
The next expected data records are missing
Game is currently closed, please come back later
Cannot start new game due to unfinished ones
Game recovery failure due to damaged records
Player did not change bet/game status in order to proceed
Please wait for one game to load before opening a second one"
Internal Error. Please contact technical support.
Internal Error: non-authorized product tampering detected.
Internal Error: DataReader has not been detached
Will not accept odds without straight bet
Will not accept odds that high
Player's cards should be split into front and back hands
Your contest entry has been completed. Close the window and return to the contest lobby.
You are not eligible to enter this tournament
Your bonus rollover requirement is complete.
Your bonus is no longer available.
Your bonus is no longer available.
Your bonus is no longer available.
Your account currency is not allowed for this game
Your account currency is not allowed for this game
No transfer is possible at this time
Buy-in for whole amounts only, no fractions.
Game is currently closed, please come back later
Card you attempted to purchase appears to be invalid.
Ticket you attempted to purchase appears to be invalid.
Ball reader error. Game will be graded manually.
language-string-table.field: If bonus is claimed deposits cannot be withdrawn from casino until rollover is met.
To remove bets, drag chips off table.
To remove bets, drag chips off table.
You have been playing for ~1 minutes
Please give me a reality check every:
No thanks, I do not need a reality check.
language-string-table.var: Initialization failed . Please contact customer support.
Spin failed. Please contact customer support.
language-string-table.field: SYMBOLS PAY LEFT TO RIGHT AND RIGHT TO LEFT
WILD SYMBOL EXPANDS TO COVER THE ENTIRE REEL IF IT AFFECTS A PAYLINE.
ONLY HIGHEST WIN PAYS PER LINE
WILD SUBSTITUTES FOR ALL SYMBOLS EXCEPT BONUS AND SCATTER.
WILD SYMBOL SUBSTITUTES FOR ALL SYMBOLS EXCEPT SCATTER.
Activates the free spin bonus round
ONLY THE HIGHEST WINNING COMBINATION PAYS PER LINE
SYSTEM MALFUNCTION VOIDS ALL PLAYS AND PAYS
ALL MULTIPLE LINE WINS WILL BE ACCUMULATED TOGETHER
ALL PAYOUTS ARE IN COINS UNLESS SPECIFIED OTHERWISE
BONUS SYMBOLS APPEAR ON REELS 2,3 AND 4
SCATTERED WINS ARE ADDED TO PAYLINE WINS
WILD SUBSTITUTES FOR ALL SYMBOLS EXCEPT BONUS.
ONLY THE HIGHEST WINNING COMBINATION PAYS PER SYMBOL COMBINATION
ALL WAY WINS PAY LEFT TO RIGHT ADJACENT SYMBOL COMBINATIONS
WILDS ONLY APPEAR ON REELS 2,3,4 AND 5
Total bet = coins bet amount x (30) bet multiplier.
Number of freespins awarded randomly range between 4 and 15.
Pharaoh's Wild Reel covers reels randomly.
CAN SUBSTITUTE ANY SYMBOL EXCEPT SCATTER.
CAN SUBSTITUTE ANY SYMBOL EXCEPT BONUS.
SYMBOLS MUST BEGIN FROM LEFT MOST FIRST REEL AND BE CONSECUTIVE.
THREE ON ANY PAYOUT LINE TRIGGERS THE BONUS ROUND
THREE ICONS ON REELS 2,3,4 TRIGGERS THE BONUS ROUND
THE FREE SPINS FEATURE IS TRIGGERED WHEN 3 OR MORE SCATTERED SYMBOLS APPEAR.
On Any Payline Activates the Bonus Feature
* BONUS ROUND CANNOT BE TRIGGERED IN FREE SPINS.
Match any 2 flowers to collect a BONUS PRIZE
Choose a robot. The robot will exit the conveyor belt to collect your bonus prize.
Choose a robot. The robot will exit the conveyor belt to collect your bonus prize.
Pick a lucky mermaid for an underwater prize collecting adventure.
TRIGGERS THE UNDERWATER BONUS ROUND ADVENTURE.
Choose a fish to receive a prize.
CHOOSE 3 BOXES AND THE QUEEN WILL AWARD YOU THE HIGHEST PRIZE.
Select prize hens to collect their eggs. Look for golden eggs to win prizes. A black egg will end the barn bonus round.
PROGRESSIVE JACKPOT PAYS ONLY ON MAX BET OTHERWISE 5X PAYS 10000 COINS.
MALFUNCTION VOIDS ALL PLAYS AND PAYS
Tap the Chips to find two numbers which are the same.
language-string-table.var: Select Any Flower to Begin. Match Any 2 Flowers to Collect Bonus ~1
language-string-table.field: click on a fish to receive a prize
language-string-table.var: Do you want to collect or bet double-or-nothing?"
Sorry, no bonus earnings this time.
language-string-table.field: Click on the Fisherman to Start the Game.
press the button below to spin the roulette. you will get the prize indicated in the winning animal square.
GO ON A BONUS MONEY SAFARI. WATCH THE SAFARI WHEEL OF ANIMALS SPIN UNTIL YOUR GUIDE STOPS AN ANIMAL WITH YOUR PRIZE.
Click on this here mr. Sheriff, an' we reckon the ole cowpoke'll serve you a winnin' poker hand!
language-string-table.var: Click anywhere to drop the line and fish for a prize.
language-string-table.field: Click anywhere to drop the line and fish for a prize.
Pop a baloon with your pin. You'll win the amount indicated by the exploding balloon!
click on one of the iguanas. the selected iguana will bring down your prize from the coconut tree
Click on one of the faces to claim your prize
Click on the Sheriff and get dealt a winning poker hand.
PAIR: 40 , TWO PAIR: 60, THREE OF A KIND: 80, STRAIGHT: 100, FLUSH: 130, FULLHOUSE: 180, FOUR OF A KIND: 200, STRAIGHT FLUSH: 225, ROYAL FLUSH: 300
slice through the fruits to collect the juicy prizes!
Select Bonus Coins to find two matching amounts
Tap the Chips to find two numbers which are the same.
Tap the Chips to find two numbers which are the same.
Strike their shields and add to your bounty, 'til the sword falls thrice!
Zap the Rats to find two of the same numbers!

SELECT A RAT FOR THE GOBLIN TO ZAP. EACH RAT CHOICE WILL DISPLAY A PRIZE AMOUNT. WHEN 2 RATS DISPLAY EQUAL AMOUNTS, THAT PRIZE WILL BE AWARDED. PRIZES RANGE BETWEEN 50 AND 200 COINS. PRIZE PAYOUT IS MULTIPLIED BY THE NUMBER OF PAYLINES HIT WITH ALL 3 BONUS ICONS.
PICK A RECORD AND SEE "BILLY" DANCE.
Click on the roosters to find two evenly matched ones
destroy five asteroids to get your prize
shoot the big white asteroids. hold down to reposition ship. release to shoot.
CLICK A BOARD TO SELECT YOUR PRIZE!
CLICK A BOARD TO SELECT YOUR PRIZE!
Select Gravestones to find two matching amounts
WHEN 2 GRAVESTONES DISPLAY EQUAL AMOUNTS, THAT PRIZE WILL BE AWARDED. PRIZES RANGE BETWEEN 50 AND 200 COINS. PRIZE PAYOUT IS MULTIPLIED BY THE NUMBER OF PAYLINES HIT WITH ALL 3 BONUS ICONS.
Bahamas Beach Jackpot includes four levels. Chest of Gold, Gold Coin, Tropical Drink, and Conch Shell
Jackpot shared between multiple games with Mystery Jackpot Bar at the top of the game.
Jackpot triggered randomly and may occur after any spin.
Scratch off the section to reveal win. Scratch off section will automatically scratch off after set time.
Jackpot winnings are added to any game winnings and are displayed in the win box along with those winnings.
Jackpot will automatically reveal in ~10 seconds.
The Freespins Wild Reel Appears Randomly On Any Reel During Freespins.
Number of freespins awarded randomly range between 5 and 40.
Wild locks randomly on a single reel for the entirety of the free spins.
When you receive 3 Icons on Reels 2,3 and 4 trigger the free spin bonus round.
Selecting your Family Symbol reveals the number of Free Spins you will receive and changes all othe Family Icons to your selected icon.
Free Spins cannot be retriggered during free spin bonus.
Choose a Crest and Conquer The Throne.
It will replace all Other Crest Icons During the Freespin Bonus Round
Sheriff badges allow you to keep spinning.
Dynamite awards free spins, Gold Bars multiply their payouts!
A BANK HEIST IS TAKING PLACE!
Let's grab some of that gold!
1 or More any winning number combination doubles your prize.
Scatter Winds are multiplied by total bet.
7 Free games are Awarded When a Garden Appears on Reel 1 with Fairy Princess on Reel 5.
All Prizes are tripled During Free Games. This Feature Cannot be Triggered.
Free Games are played at the lines and bet of the Triggered Game.
A progressive Jackpot can be Won at the Conclusion of any game.
The Jackpot is triggered at Random.
Progressive jackpot Wins are added to other wins.
Random Jackpot Contribution is no more than 1.5% of Total Return to Player.
Stacked Wild only appears on reel 3 with all icons wild.
Three or more Lion's Bonus Icons triggers the Lion's Roar Scatter Pay.
Big Cheese Wild shows only on reels 4 and 5 with all four icons wild.
This is a 25 fixed line game.
Multiplier values can be x2, x3, x4 and x5.
When two or more wild multipliers appear on the same winning payline and are part of the same winning combination they are added resulting in the final multiplier for that line.
Multiplier Wild Symbols can appear randomly on Reels 2,3, and 4 and apply only if part of a winning line.

First Cow Trophy Icon revealed on a reel activates curtain section for that reel. Reels can only be activated once. Once all 5 Reel curtain sections are activated, curtain lowers to reveal your award! Accumulated Curtain activated sections are stored until bonus is won. Once prize awarded curtain sections are reset.
